## About Amari

Amari Rodriguez brings a bold, vibrant approach to traditional and neo-traditional tattooing. With a foundation in fine art and illustration, their work blends classic American traditional motifs with contemporary color theory and composition.

### Style & Approach

Amari specializes in creating dynamic, eye-catching pieces that stand the test of time. Whether it's a classic sailor jerry design or a modern illustrative piece, each tattoo is crafted with precision and passion.

### Booking

Amari is currently accepting new clients. For custom work, please submit a booking request with reference images and your vision for the piece.

## About Christy

Christy Lumberg is a resident artist at United Tattoo, specializing in fine line work, botanical designs, and geometric patterns. Her delicate approach to tattooing creates elegant, timeless pieces.

### Style & Approach

With a keen eye for detail and a steady hand, Christy excels at creating intricate designs that flow naturally with the body's contours. Her botanical work captures the beauty of nature in stunning detail.

### Booking

Christy is currently accepting new clients for custom fine line and botanical work. Please include reference images with your booking request.

## About Donovan

Donovan Lankford is a master of realism and portrait work at United Tattoo. With years of experience and a background in fine art, Donovan brings photographs and memories to life on skin.

### Style & Approach

Donovan's work is characterized by exceptional detail, smooth gradients, and lifelike rendering. Whether it's a portrait of a loved one or a realistic nature scene, each piece captures the essence of the subject.

### Booking

Donovan is currently accepting commissions for realistic work. High-quality reference photos are essential for portrait work—please include them with your booking request.

## About John

John Lapides brings decades of experience to United Tattoo, with mastery in both American traditional and Japanese styles. His bold lines and vibrant colors create tattoos that age beautifully.

### Style & Approach

John's work honors the classic traditions of tattooing while incorporating his own artistic vision. Whether it's a traditional eagle or a Japanese sleeve, each piece is executed with precision and respect for the craft.

### Booking

John is currently accepting new clients for both traditional and Japanese work. Large-scale projects and sleeves are welcome—please describe your vision in your booking request.

## About Pako

Pako Martinez is a vibrant force at United Tattoo, known for bold neo-traditional work and stunning use of color. His illustrative style brings a unique energy to every piece.

### Style & Approach

Pako's work is characterized by dynamic compositions, rich color palettes, and a playful yet refined aesthetic. He excels at transforming ideas into eye-catching, wearable art.

### Booking

Pako is currently accepting new clients. For best results, bring reference images that capture the mood and style you're looking for.

## About Steven

Steven Sole Cedre is a resident artist at United Tattoo with a versatile approach to tattooing. From custom designs to realistic black and grey work, Steven brings technical excellence to every project.

### Style & Approach

Steven's work spans multiple styles, unified by his commitment to quality and attention to detail. He works closely with each client to bring their vision to life.

### Booking

Steven is currently accepting new clients. Please include your ideas and any reference images with your booking request.
